# Add API Endpoint

Create a new REST endpoint following our conventions.

## Requirements
- Endpoint: {{method}} {{path}}
- Purpose: {{description}}

## Instructions
1. Add the route handler in `src/index.js`
2. Validate all input parameters
3. Return appropriate status codes
4. Add tests covering success and error cases
5. Update README.md API table
